_comment: Claude Code 插件 / skill 全量清单（跨机器盘点）。marketplaces 列出所有需注册的源，plugins 列出各源下的插件及其携带的 skill。新机器：先 /plugin marketplace add 各源，再 /plugin install 各插件（或由 install.sh / install.ps1 据本文件自动注册+启用）。

marketplaces.note: 自建独立仓库；本地开发和私有 overlay 使用该仓库自带的 install.ps1

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: 核心技能库：TDD、系统化调试、并行 Agent、代码审查、计划执行等最佳实践
plugins.author: Jesse Vincent

plugins.name: commit-commands
plugins.description: Git 工作流：/commit 提交、/push 推送、/pr 创建 PR
plugins.author: Anthropic

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: 自动化代码审查，多 Agent 协作 + 置信度评分
plugins.author: Anthropic

plugins.name: feature-dev
plugins.description: 功能开发工作流：代码库探索 → 架构设计 → 质量审查
plugins.author: Anthropic

plugins.name: code-simplifier
plugins.description: 代码简化 Agent，提升可读性和可维护性
plugins.author: Anthropic

plugins.name: security-guidance
plugins.description: 安全提醒 Hook，编辑文件时警告注入、XSS 等安全隐患
plugins.author: Anthropic

plugins.name: claude-md-management
plugins.description: CLAUDE.md 维护工具：质量审计、会话学习捕获、项目记忆更新
plugins.author: Anthropic

plugins.name: plugin-dev
plugins.description: 插件开发工具包：创建插件、Skill/Command/Hook/Agent 开发指南
plugins.author: Anthropic

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Skill 脚手架：创建、打包、校验自定义 skill
plugins.author: Anthropic

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: 前端设计 skill
plugins.author: Anthropic

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: GitHub MCP 服务器：Issue、PR、代码审查、仓库搜索
plugins.author: GitHub

plugins.name: pyright-lsp
plugins.description: Pyright LSP 集成，为 Python 项目提供类型检查和代码智能
plugins.author: Anthropic

plugins.name: swift-lsp
plugins.description: Swift LSP 集成（Windows 机启用）
plugins.author: Anthropic

plugins.name: clangd-lsp
plugins.description: C/C++ clangd LSP 集成
plugins.author: Anthropic

plugins.name: ralph-loop
plugins.description: Ralph 自动化迭代循环
plugins.author: Anthropic

plugins.name: telegram
plugins.description: Telegram 收发消息 / 通知（external plugin，含 access / configure skill）
plugins.author: Anthropic

plugins.name: planning-with-files
plugins.description: 用文件管理计划 / 任务，跨工具（cursor/codex/gemini 等）多副本，多语言变体
plugins.author: OthmanAdi

plugins.name: ui-ux-pro-max
plugins.description: UI/UX 设计套件：设计系统、品牌、banner、幻灯、UI 样式
plugins.author: nextlevelbuilder

plugins.name: document-skills
plugins.description: 官方文档/创作技能集：docx/pdf/pptx/xlsx、canvas-design、mcp-builder、webapp-testing 等
plugins.author: Anthropic

plugins.name: claude-mem
plugins.description: 记忆 / 知识库：mem-search、smart-explore、knowledge-agent、timeline-report、make-plan 等
plugins.author: thedotmack

plugins.name: hzb
plugins.description: 自建跨工具 skill：codex-review、conference-meeting-summary、okf、web-access、save-memory-before-compact
plugins.author: hanzebei
